message: I've been thinking lately about how much easier it is to prep when you have a solid checklist to work from—turns out Ready.gov has a really straightforward one that covers the basics without making your head spin. The nice thing about having a kit ready is that it takes the guesswork out of "what do I actually need" when you're not in a panic. Have you found a checklist or resource that's made prepping feel less overwhelming for your family?
